title: CLT3-8

description: Schools can administer CLT3-8 exams online or on paper to assess their students' growth in language arts and mathematics.

title: CLT3-6 Exams
description: The CLT3, 4, 5, and 6 serve as diagnostic and summative exams for 3rd-6th graders, assessing reading, grammar, writing, and math.

title: CLT8
description: The CLT8 is an online diagnostic or summative assessment for 7th and 8th graders that can be proctored by parents at home or taken in-school.

title: CLT10 Exam
description: The CLT10 is an online college preparatory exam that helps 9th and 10th graders practice for the CLT and connect early with colleges.

title: CLT
description: The CLT is an online college entrance exam for 11th and 12th graders accepted at hundreds of colleges and universities.

title: Home
description: Classic Learning Test (CLT) provides thoughtfully designed assessments that reflect a traditional education and offer meaningful insights.

description: Learn why CLT has become the preferred assessment provider for thousands of homeschool families and co-ops.

title: State Homeschool Testing Requirements
description: CLT assessments can be used to fulfill homeschool testing requirements in many states. Explore our interactive map to learn more.

title: Register
description: By registering for a Classic Learning Test (CLT) account, you can schedule your exam, take practice exams, and track score results.

title: Tests
description: CLT's assessments for 3rd-12th graders provide a meaningful and comprehensive measure of students' aptitude and achievement.

title: Testing Accommodations
description: CLT is happy to provide testing accommodations to students with documented disabilities. title: CLT for U.S. Military Service Academies
description: The Classic Learning Test will officially be accepted for admissions by U.S. Service Academies, beginning with the 2027 Admissions Cycle. Students who apply for U.S. Service Academies can begin submitting their test scores in February of 2026.

description: Florida students can use CLT scores to apply to Florida state universities, earn Bright Futures scholarships, and more.

description: CLT partners with parental choice programs across the United States to give families increased access to our assessments.
